title: Bootstrap Tooltip for Open in Salesforce Icons
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the Salesforce icon tooltip to indicate whether I'm opening a dashboard or report, using consistent Bootstrap-styled tooltips.
description: Updates the Salesforce icon tooltips to use consistent Bootstrap-styled tooltips instead of raw HTML title attributes. The tooltip text indicates whether the item is a report or dashboard: "Open Report in Salesforce" or "Open Dashboard in Salesforce." This provides visual consistency with other tooltips across the application.
acceptance_criteria: Tooltip text differentiates between Report and Dashboard
Tooltip styling is consistent with other tooltips in the application
ux_changes: Replaced HTML title tooltips with Bootstrap-styled tooltips. Text now differentiates between 'Open Report in Salesforce' and 'Open Dashboard in Salesforce'.
implementation_notes: Initial implementation used HTML title tooltips. Ryan requested Bootstrap tooltips for consistency. Waqar updated the implementation.
comment_summary: Balaji initially used HTML tooltips. Ryan requested Bootstrap tooltips for consistency. Waqar updated and submitted for review.
